exploration_notes: In apache/kafka, there are no actual Java annotations named @ConfigKey or @ConfigDef. Instead, the configuration documentation system is built around the `ConfigDef` class and its inner class `ConfigKey` (not annotations). The core definition is in `ConfigDef.java` which defines both the configuration schema class and the `ConfigKey` inner class (line 1237), along with documentation generation methods: `toHtml()`, `toHtmlTable()`, `toRst()`, and `toEnrichedRst()`. `AbstractConfig.java` is the ba
